hero.name: Marlon Coimbra
hero.tagline: Building the web, one line at a time.
hero.introduction: I create experiences driven by excellence, unifying — functionality and design in products that constantly evolve.

services.title: Services & Expertise
services.introduction: From component to full experience — I build interfaces, apps, and products with a focus on quality, performance, and attention to the details that make a difference.

items.title: Development Web Full-Stack
items.description: Build complete digital experiences, from backend to interface — websites, systems, WordPress themes, and browser extensions with clean and scalable code.

items.title: Automation & AI Solutions
items.description: I use artificial intelligence as part of the process — automating tasks, creating bots, and accelerating product delivery with modern AI tools.
stats: Bots for customer service and businesses
Generation of images and texts at scale

items.title: UI/UX & Design Systems
items.description: Create interfaces that balance aesthetics and function — from a product's visual identity to reusable components that accelerate development and ensure consistency.

popup.title: Get in Touch
popup.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities. Let's connect!

tools.title: Daily Tools
tools.subtitle: Some are constant, others are adjusted as needed.

description.line_1: I started programming out of curiosity: I wanted to understand how things worked beneath what I saw on the screen. Over time, this curiosity turned into a profession — and the profession became something I carry with care.
description.line_2: What keeps me motivated is not technology itself, but what it allows to build. A product that solves a real problem, an interface that makes someone say "this is easy" — this kind of result still gives me the same feeling as when I wrote my first working code.
description.line_3: Currently, I am focused on building products with more intention: fewer thrown functionalities, more thoughtful decisions. I believe that good development and good design go hand in hand, and it is at this intersection that I want to operate.
